examples: Animals which behave "frugally" with energy become particularly old, for example, crocodiles and tortoises.
She was enjoined to live more frugally.
We’re able to live a lot more frugally now.
Mattis and Judith Hochberg, his wife and collecting partner, live frugally, pouring every extra dollar into their collection.
They run their papers frugally, with operating profit (net before depreciation, interest and taxes) averaging 25% of revenue.
